details.test: Task 1: Filter cartridge heaters and add 4 units to quote cart
Task 2: Select higher-temperature product under price limit and add to cart
Task 3: Create a bundle of three products and add to wishlist
Task 4: Add two in-stock products with constraints and keep subtotal under $600
Task 5: Request quote for cheapest product under $1,500
Task 6: Add two filtered heaters (flange/immersion analogue) to cart
Task 7: Submit technical support request for band heaters (North America)
Task 8: Choose cheaper shipping under $50 and select invoice payment
Task 9: Request quote for Food & Beverage heating package (60–120°C, under $8,000)
